data.commText: Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, good length just outside off, Esterhuizen hangs back and bunts it down to long-on
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, turning down leg, clipped to backward square
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, driven firmly to mid-off, can't beat the fielder
Slip in place
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, 1 run, full on middle and leg, he clears the front leg and drives to long-off
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, no run, good length and turning away from off, Forrester defends with an open face towards backward point
Mitchell Santner to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, drifting in around off, defended forward
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, 1 run, turning in off a good length, Forrester punches it down to long-on
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, again tries a reverse-sweep and this time he's cramped up on leg stump. Drags it off the under-edge onto pad
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, tries a reverse-sweep but is made to wait with Santner slowing it up. Goes through the shot early, drags it off the toe-end in front of slip

Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, review taken by New Zealand! Round the wicket, nicely floated on a good length, pitches around middle and leg and turns sharply to beat the inside edge in defence. It popped up off the back leg to slip, but it clearly missed the edge. As for the LBW appeal, it was too high, bouncing over the stumps

Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, would've been a stunner from short leg had he taken it! Forrester clipped it firmly off the back foot, went quickly and low to Robinson who somehow got two hands to it but couldn't hold on
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 2 runs, tossed up outside off, drifts away, Esterhuizen reaches out and drives through the covers
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, 1 run, short and wide, Forrester cuts firmly but fails to beat deep point to his right
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, turning down the leg-side, Esterhuizen clips it comfortably behind square
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, 1 run, turning away off a good length outside off, Forrester goes for the drive and gets it away through cover
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, turns in off a good length, Esterhuizen looks to defend but gets a thick inside edge through square leg
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, 1 run, full toss around off, driven to long-off
Mitchell Santner to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, pushed through on a good length, Esterhuizen hangs back and punches to the left of Santner who cuts it off

Mitchell Santner to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, it's a masterclass from Santner! Esterhuizen makes a gesture to indicate that he's helpless and can't do anything against this quality of bowling. And on this pitch. Plenty of flight, lures him into the drive but the ball dips and turns sharply past the edge
Mitchell Santner to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, backs away to the leg-side, Santner follows him and cramps him on the cut. Chops it off a thick under-edge past leg stump
Mitchell Santner to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, sharp turn off a good length, Esterhuizen is drawn forward in defence and then beaten on the edge
Mitchell Santner to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, hangs back to this one as it's slightly flatter, manages to defend from the crease
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, 1 run, overpitched on off, driven to long-on
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 2 runs, slow and tossed up just outside off, Esterhuizen looks to drive hard and slices it off the outside half through backward point
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, 1 run, full toss on the pads, whipped to deep midwicket
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, tossed up, drifting across off, Esterhuizen hangs back and taps it into the point region
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, 1 run, floated up and drifting in on middle, Forrester drives to long-off
Cole McConchie to Dian Forrester, no run, good length outside off, turning away, Forrester goes back and bunts it to short cover
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, floated up full just outside off, Esterhuizen knocks it down the ground to long-on
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, now this is pushed quicker and slides on with the angle past the outside edge

Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, wow Santner has it on a string out there. And the pitch is his ally. Slow, dips on a good length around off and turns sharply. Forrester gets an inside edge onto pad as he looks to defend
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, slightly quicker and fuller, defended

Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, no run, slow, dipping and turning in off a good length, Forrester looks to defend but gets a thick inside edge that rolls to leg slip. Might actually struck him on the glove as it kicked up off the pitch
Mitchell Santner to Dian Forrester, 2 runs, round the wicket to the left-hander as well, drifting across off, Forrester goes for the reverse-sweep straightaway and gets it through backward point
Dian Forrester, left handed bat, comes to the crease
Drinks are on the field now!

Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, out Stumped!! Beautifully bowled and Latham is confident of a stumping. Yes he clearly doesn't have anything behind the crease. It's so well flighted, dips on Smith sharply and he's made to stretch on the forward defence. In the process, the back foot is dragged out of the crease and he's out of his ground when the bails are taken off. The pitch has been offering turn and this one absolutely ripped past the edge. Jason Smith steps out and Latham b Mitchell Santner 10(14) [4s-1]
Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, THATS OUT!! Stumped!!
Mitchell Santner [1.0-0-4-0] is back into the attack
Cole McConchie to Jason Smith, 1 run, dragged down short, it's down the leg-side and Smith pulls it to deep backward square
Cole McConchie to Jason Smith, 2 runs, uses his feet and knocks it down to long-on
Cole McConchie to Jason Smith, no run, floated up on middle, drifting away, Smith defends down the pitch
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, tucked off the back foot through square leg
Cole McConchie to Connor Esterhuizen, FOUR, he goes reverse and nails the sweep through backward point
Cole McConchie to Jason Smith, 1 run, Smith uses his feet, gets to the pitch and drills this to long-off
McConchie from round the wicket
Cole McConchie, right-arm off break, comes into the attack
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, right in the blockhole just outside off, Esterhuizen squeezes it to cover
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, slower bumper turning back in, Esterhuizen looks to pull but it loops over his head as he bends his knees slightly
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, fuller than a good length around off, defended from the crease
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, slower one at the stumps, Esterhuizen defends gently down the pitch
Ben Sears to Jason Smith, 1 run, good length in the channel, Smith hangs back, opens the face and guides it to third man
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, slower one floated up around off, Esterhuizen is early through the shot and isn't in control as he flicks through midwicket
Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, no run, now he's made to reach for the drive as the ball dips on him. Gets it off the inside half down the pitch
Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, no run, inside edge onto pad as he looks to drive, probably didn't turn as much as he expected

Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, no run, beaten on the outside edge and it misses leg stump! He backed away and Santner followed him down the leg-side before getting the ball to turn sharply off a good length

Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, FOUR, runs away off a thick edge past slip! Tossed up and drifting in on off, it's slow from Santner, invites the drive and finds enough purchase to catch the edge. Runs away past slip
Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, no run, drifting in on leg, good length ball that grips and turns, Smith defends
Mitchell Santner to Jason Smith, no run, sharp turn off a good length, Smith looks to defend and is beaten. Lovely from Santner, keeping it slow and finding purchase
Mitchell Santner, Left arm orthodox, comes into the attack
Ben Sears to Jason Smith, 1 run, full delivery on off, Smith knocks it gently in front of mid-off
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, leg byes, 1 run, full delivery angling down leg, Esterhuizen tries whipping it away and is hit on the pad

Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, SIX, that's on the roof! Full on the pads, proper hit-me delivery and it's dispatched with a flick of the wrists by Esterhuizen. Disappears over the long leg boundary and settles on the roof. Replacement ball needed!

Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, byes, FOUR, slower one banged into the pitch, turns down the leg-side and Esterhuizen is through the pull too early. He misses, the keeper misses and away it goes to the boundary
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, hard length in the channel, Esterhuizen punches to cover
Ben Sears to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, angled in on off, good length ball, Esterhuizen defends from the crease
Ben Sears, right-arm fast medium, comes into the attack
Kyle Jamieson to Jason Smith, no run, good length in the channel, defended wide of point for a quick single
Jason Smith, right handed bat, comes to the crease

Kyle Jamieson to Rubin Hermann, out Caught by Latham!! That's a super catch from Latham with the gloves. Went very high into the night sky, he kept swirling under it before having to put in the dive. Hangs on. Full delivery around off, Hermann makes room looking to hit over cover and all he manages is a thick edge. The ball nipped away a touch probably. Rubin Hermann c Latham b Kyle Jamieson 7(6) [6s-1],
Kyle Jamieson to Rubin Hermann, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Kyle Jamieson to Rubin Hermann, SIX, back of a length, sits up around the waist and Hermann dismisses it from his presence. Pulled into the crowd
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, knocks this to mid-on for a single
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, wide, banged in short, bounces very high and it's called a wide for height. The replay shows that it wasn't that high, harsh call from the ump
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, nipping in from back of a length, defended from the crease
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, nipping into the pads, back of a length, Esterhuizen tucks it gently into the on-side
Zakary Foulkes to Rubin Hermann, no run, defended
Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, pulled away to deep square leg
Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, good length just outside off, defended next to the pitch
Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, FOUR, some width outside off, back of a length, Esterhuizen goes hard on the cut and slaps it through point
Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, 2 runs, advances down to a short ball, takes it on with the pull shot, and miscues it in the air over midwicket

Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, peach of a delivery! Hits a good length, the ball is angled in at the stumps, the batter is caught in the crease in defence and the ball nips away late. Squared him up
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, good length around middle, nips back in a touch, the batter looks to defend from the crease and gets a thick inside edge down to fine leg
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, 2 runs, full delivery at the stumps, the batter drives down the ground and beats mid-on to his left
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, back of a length outside off, steered to backward point
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, bashed in on back of a length, Esterhuizen defends from the crease
Kyle Jamieson to Rubin Hermann, 1 run, sharp away-swinger from off, steered wide of backward point
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, short of length outside off, Esterhuizen opens the face and steers it down to third man
Kyle Jamieson to Connor Esterhuizen, wide, angling down the leg-side, Esterhuizen doesn't get anything on it
Zakary Foulkes to Rubin Hermann, no run, angled into the pads, tucked gently into the on-side
Zakary Foulkes to Rubin Hermann, no run, full delivery on off, swinging away, Hermann defends from the crease
Rubin Hermann, left handed bat, comes to the crease

Zakary Foulkes to de Zorzi, out Caught by Bevon Jacobs!! Sliced in the air and gone! Short of length outside off, shapes away against the angle and also stands up on de Zorzi as he goes for the pull. He's unable to get on top of the bounce and slices it over mid-on who runs back and takes it safely as it drops over his left shoulder. de Zorzi c Bevon Jacobs b Zakary Foulkes 2(8)
Zakary Foulkes to de Zorzi, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Round the wicket for the left-hander
Zakary Foulkes to de Zorzi, no run, strays on the pads with the angle, clipped to midwicket
Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, 1 run, swinging in at the stumps, back of a length, Esterhuizen shuffles across and tucks it behind square

data.headline: 40+ in the poweplay?
data.content: Foulkes can swing the ball sharply and he's likely to pick up a wicket in the powerplay. South Africa can bat risk-free and expect them to score in excess of 40.

data.commText: Zakary Foulkes to Connor Esterhuizen, no run, full inswinger at the stumps, defended half-forward
Zakary Foulkes, right-arm medium, comes into the attack
Kyle Jamieson to de Zorzi, no run, good length at the stumps, Tony de Zorzi looks to swipe hard and drags it off the inside edge onto pad
Kyle Jamieson to de Zorzi, no run, advances down for a big shot, Jamieson pounds it on back of a length and it zips through to the keeper. Tony de Zorzi wanted to pull hard but it snuck right through

Kyle Jamieson to de Zorzi, no run, away-swinger across off, late shape, Tony de Zorzi opens the face and steers it to backward point. He makes a gesture with his hand, indicating how the ball swung away from him

Kyle Jamieson to de Zorzi, 2 runs, first runs off the bat. Short of length delivery angled away outside off, Tony de Zorzi goes flat-batted and hits it straight of mid-off. Timing isn't great and the fielder chases it down
Kyle Jamieson to de Zorzi, leg byes, FOUR, down the leg-side, short of length, Tony de Zorzi looks to pull but misses. Goes off his thigh pad past the keeper
Kyle Jamieson to de Zorzi, no run, short of length on off, spongy bounce, Tony de Zorzi gets on his toes and dabs it to backward point
de Zorzi and Connor Esterhuizen are at the crease. de Zorzi is on strike. Kyle Jamieson will open the attack
Jordan Hermann will not open the innings after the hamstring injury he suffered earlier. De Zorzi and Esterhuizen are the two openers. Jamieson with the new ball. One slip in place.

Coetzee: We did our homework and we bowled very well tonight. Bowled in incredible partnerships and everyone played their part. We got a bit of swing up front which is nice. So calm, cool and collected like he has played 50 games (talking about debutant Nqobani Mokoena). The boys are going to go out there and try to kill it (in the chase).

20:29 Local Time, 07:29 GMT, 12:59 IST: South Africa will be super pleased with this bowling performance. Gerald Coetzee set the tone upfront as he accounted for both the New Zealand openers. Baartman removed the next two batters in his opening over. Rubin Hermann scored a direct-hit to dismiss Bevon Jacobs and the hosts were reduced to 35/5 inside the powerplay. Santner, who struck a couple of boundaries, tried to be aggressive against his counterpart and paid the price as he was cleaned up by a turning delivery. Neesham top-scored with 26 and once he got deceived by a Nqobani Mokoena slower ball, things unravelled quickly for the Kiwis. Three wickets for debutant Mokoena and two apiece for Coetzee, Baartman and Maharaj. There was swing and seam movement with the new ball, Maharaj got it to spin as well. There's a lot of assistance for the bowlers but 91 is well below-par. Will it be a cakewalk for the Proteas? The run-chase coming up shortly...

Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, out Caught by Rubin Hermann!! New Zealand have been bowled out for 91. Short ball from Mokoena, McConchie backs away to pull despite the ball getting big on him. Hits him high on the bat and long-on comes in to take the catch. Cole McConchie c Rubin Hermann b Nqobani Mokoena 15(11) [4s-1]
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, wide, bouncer that's too short outside off, ignored by the batter and the keeper times his jump well to collect it
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, no run, slower ball off-cutter, McConchie wafts and misses
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, FOUR, McConchie comes down the track, moves leg-side and throws his arms to flay this length ball over and wide of extra cover
Ben Sears, right handed bat, comes to the crease

Keshav Maharaj to Kyle Jamieson, out Bowled!! Another one bites the dust. 93.9kph, quick arm ball that slides on around off, Jamieson stays on the back foot and is late to bring his bat down. Ends up playing outside the line of the delivery as well and hears the death rattle. Kyle Jamieson b Keshav Maharaj 2(5)
Keshav Maharaj to Kyle Jamieson, THATS OUT!! Bowled!!
Keshav Maharaj to Kyle Jamieson, no run, clips this non-turner to midwicket
Keshav Maharaj to Kyle Jamieson, no run, 90.1kph, fired in on leg, Jamieson keeps it out on the leg-side
Keshav Maharaj to Kyle Jamieson, 2 runs, stabbed through extra cover for a couple of runs
Keshav Maharaj to Kyle Jamieson, no run, 87.8kph, leg-lined, Jamieson stays back to a full ball to blunt it to midwicket
Keshav Maharaj to Cole McConchie, 1 run, 91.6kph, hint of spin from a length, McConchie goes on the back foot to punch and outside-edges to short third man
Kyle Jamieson, right handed bat, comes to the crease

Nqobani Mokoena to Zakary Foulkes, out Caught by Connor Esterhuizen!! Second wicket in the over for Nqobani Mokoena. Pace and bounce, too good for Zakary Foulkes. Rises from a short of length marginally outside off, Foulkes has a little poke at it and all he manages to get is an outside edge. Easy grab for the keeper. New Zealand lose their eighth wicket with seven overs to go. Zakary Foulkes c Connor Esterhuizen b Nqobani Mokoena 1(3)
Nqobani Mokoena to Zakary Foulkes, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, 1 run, short of length outside off, punched to sweeper cover
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, no run, slower ball on a fullish length outside off, McConchie spots it late and pushes it to backward point
Nqobani Mokoena to Cole McConchie, wide, bouncer, McConchie lets it pass and that's been wided for height
Nqobani Mokoena to Zakary Foulkes, 1 run, 132.5kph, short of length outside off, Foulkes guides it to third man off the outside edge
Nqobani Mokoena to Zakary Foulkes, no run, short ball, Foulkes walks forward and across to keep it out on the leg-side
Zakary Foulkes, right handed bat, comes to the crease

Nqobani Mokoena to James Neesham, out Caught by Connor Esterhuizen!! Maiden T20I wicket for Nqobani Mokoena! Slower ball on a fullish length from over the wicket, Neesham gets low to slog it across the line and is early into his shot. All he manages is an outside edge that's been pouched by the keeper. James Neesham c Connor Esterhuizen b Nqobani Mokoena 26(21) [4s-2 6s-1]
Nqobani Mokoena to James Neesham, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Nqobani Mokoena [2.0-0-18-0] is back into the attack
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, 1 run, patted towards point
Jordan Hermann, who made a sliding stop earlier in the over, is off the field holding his right hamstring
Keshav Maharaj to Cole McConchie, 3 runs, goes back to cut and edges it fine to third man
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, 1 run, leg-lined, worked through square leg
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, no run, shimmies down and moves leg-side but gets cramped for room by this quicker delivery and knocks it back to the bowler
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, 2 runs, brooms this length ball to fine leg
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, SIX, 89.6kph, flat ball just outside leg, Neesham inverses his stance to swat it over deep point. The man in the deep jumps but it's well over his head
Ottneil Baartman to James Neesham, 1 run, hammers the pull to long-on

Ottneil Baartman to James Neesham, FOUR, short of length on the stumps, Neesham walks across a long way to play a premeditated shot. Loses his balance and tumbles but he's made decent contact with the scoop to send it to the fine leg fence
Ottneil Baartman to Cole McConchie, 3 runs, 137.9kph, fuller than a good length, McConchie chips it over mid-off. Coetzee runs back from mid-off and slides to pull it back to save a run
Ottneil Baartman to Cole McConchie, 2 runs, short ball, wristily pulled to deep backward square leg and Jordan Hermann makes a sliding stop to his right
Ottneil Baartman to James Neesham, 1 run, 135kph, Baartman pulls his length back and that's been pulled to long-on
Ottneil Baartman to James Neesham, no run, 138kph, pitched up delivery from round the wicket, driven hard and straight to mid-off
Ottneil Baartman [2.0-0-11-2] is back into the attack
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, 1 run, dabbed towards point
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, no run, quick in-turner, almost sneaks through. Fortunately for Neesham, he gets an inside edge that doesn't deflect onto the stumps
Keshav Maharaj to Cole McConchie, 1 run, 87.4kph, fraction short, stabbed to sweeper cover
Keshav Maharaj to Cole McConchie, no run, 89.9kph, full delivery, pushed to point
Cole McConchie, right handed bat, comes to the crease
Time for a drink with the home team tottering at 54/6.

Keshav Maharaj to Mitchell Santner, out Bowled!! Keshav Maharaj cleans up his counterpart. Slower, more revs and trifle short. Santner shimmies down the track premeditatively to slog across the line. He's through the shot early, fails to connect and the ball spins through the gate to crash into the stumps. Mitchell Santner b Keshav Maharaj 15(19) [4s-2]
Keshav Maharaj to Mitchell Santner, THATS OUT!! Bowled!!
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, 1 run, swept to short fine leg

Dian Forrester to Mitchell Santner, 2 runs, with mid-off inside the circle, that's a pretty safe shot. Pitched up delivery, Santner clears his front leg to loft it over mid-off. Not quite off the middle of the bat, so a couple
Dian Forrester to Mitchell Santner, no run, moves leg-side to punch it to cover
Dian Forrester to James Neesham, 1 run, stabbed to sweeper cover
Dian Forrester to Mitchell Santner, 1 run, throws his arms at this length ball and slices it towards third man
Dian Forrester to Mitchell Santner, no run, back of a length, Santner backs away a bit to defend it to cover
Dian Forrester to Mitchell Santner, no run, over the wicket, short of a good length ball on the stumps, Santner defends it into off
Dian Forrester, right-arm fast, comes into the attack
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, no run, slower and Maharaj gets it to spin, turned to midwicket
Keshav Maharaj to Mitchell Santner, 1 run, arm ball, skids off the deck, Santner goes back and brings his bat down hurriedly to keep it out on the off-side
Keshav Maharaj to Mitchell Santner, no run, spins in from a length, Santner goes back to flick and inside-edges onto his pad
Keshav Maharaj to Mitchell Santner, no run, tossed up and full, blocked back to the bowler
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, 1 run, taps this length ball towards backward point for a single
Keshav Maharaj to James Neesham, FOUR, Neesham greets Maharaj with a boundary. The left-hander inverses his stance and brooms it through backward point
Keshav Maharaj, Left arm orthodox, comes into the attack
Nqobani Mokoena to Mitchell Santner, FOUR, poor line. Length ball down leg, Santner brings his wrists into play to whip it over short fine leg. A couple of bounces and into the fence
Nqobani Mokoena to James Neesham, 1 run, slow, full and on the pads, Neesham is early to flick and chips it over square leg
Nqobani Mokoena to Mitchell Santner, 1 run, no room on offer, Santner defends from the crease and the inside edge takes it to square leg
Nqobani Mokoena to James Neesham, 1 run, 134.3kph, short of a good length, dabbed towards backward point who makes a diving stop
Nqobani Mokoena to James Neesham, no run, away-angler on a short of length, left alone
Nqobani Mokoena to James Neesham, no run, length ball outside off, driven to cover
Nqobani Mokoena [1.0-0-11-0] is back into the attack
Ottneil Baartman to Mitchell Santner, no run, pitched up delivery, Santner drives to mid-off
James Neesham, left handed bat, comes to the crease

Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, out Bevon Jacobs Run Out!! Direct-hit and gone! Length ball, Jacobs pushes it to cover and sets off for a non-existent single. Rubin Hermann moves forward, collects it, pivots a bit and hits the bullseye at the bowler's end. Terrific stuff from South Africa. New Zealand have lost half their side inside the powerplay. Bevon Jacobs run out (Rubin Hermann) 10(7) [6s-1]
Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, THATS OUT!! Run Out!!
Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, no run, comes down the track and miscues the drive back to the bowler
Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, no run, driven back to the bowler
Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, 2 runs, on a length and wide of off, Jacobs eases it through point
Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, SIX, that's a superb shot! Full ball in the slot, Jacobs presses forward to loft it downtown. Clean strike
Gerald Coetzee to Mitchell Santner, no run, shortish ball, Santner stands tall to drop it into the off-side
Gerald Coetzee to Mitchell Santner, no run, 138.1kph, Coetzee pulls his length back and bowls it wider, Santner has a waft at it and misses
Gerald Coetzee to Mitchell Santner, FOUR, full delivery, Santner drives straight of mid-off and the ball is quick to reach the fence. Just a push but the timing is spot-on
Gerald Coetzee to Mitchell Santner, no run, full delivery, seams away outside off, Santner drives with cemented feet to get beaten on the outside edge
Gerald Coetzee to Mitchell Santner, 2 runs, angling away on a length, not much feet movement but Santner sweetly drives through point
Gerald Coetzee to Bevon Jacobs, 1 run, in-seamer on a short of length, Jacobs hurriedly turns it to backward square leg off the inner part of the bat
Ottneil Baartman to Mitchell Santner, no run, full delivery, pushed to mid-off
Ottneil Baartman to Mitchell Santner, no run, short of length, defended into off
Mitchell Santner, left handed bat, comes to the crease

Ottneil Baartman to Nick Kelly, out Bowled!! Cleaned up! The South Africans are cock-a-hoop. 138.3kph, good length delivery that seams in a shade. Kelly defends from the crease and doesn't account for the inward movement. The ball sneaks through the bat-pad gap to crash into the stumps. Nick Kelly b Ottneil Baartman 2(5)
Ottneil Baartman to Nick Kelly, THATS OUT!! Bowled!!
Ottneil Baartman to Bevon Jacobs, 1 run, length ball on off, tapped towards point
Bevon Jacobs, right handed bat, comes to the crease

Ottneil Baartman to Tim Robinson, out Caught by George Linde!! Three down! Ottneil Baartman strikes in his opening over. 134.3kph, full delivery, Robinson clears his front leg to loft it downtown but gets the timing wrong. Barely gets any elevation on it and Linde dives forward to take a fine catch. Tim Robinson c George Linde b Ottneil Baartman 6(5) [4s-1]
Ottneil Baartman to Tim Robinson, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Ottneil Baartman to Nick Kelly, 2 wides, the line is way down leg now, Kelly flicks and misses. The keeper can't stop it cleanly either
Ottneil Baartman to Nick Kelly, no run, over the wicket, angling away outside off, no shot offered
Ottneil Baartman, right-arm fast medium, comes into the attack

Gerald Coetzee to Nick Kelly, 1 run, in the air and safe. Looked like the slower delivery from Coetzee, Kelly leans across to drive and he ends up slicing it over and behind backward point. The ball falls between backward point and third man
Gerald Coetzee to Tim Robinson, 1 run, full delivery, Robinson hangs back to knock it to mid-on
Gerald Coetzee to Tim Robinson, no run, shortish around the leg-stump, Robinson walks across a long way to play a premeditated scoop and misses
Gerald Coetzee to Nick Kelly, 1 run, 141.5kph, Kelly comes down the track and chops this away-angler to third man off the under-edge
Gerald Coetzee to Nick Kelly, no run, length ball outside off, a watchful leave from Kelly follows
Gerald Coetzee to Nick Kelly, wide, low full toss well outside off, Kelly tries to reach for it, misses
Nick Kelly, left handed bat, comes to the crease

Gerald Coetzee to Latham, out Lbw!! Latham has been adjudged lbw and he decides to walk off. Hint of inward shape for Coetzee with this good length delivery. Latham plays all around it while trying to flick it and misses it altogether to get hit on the front pad adjacent to the stumps. Ball-tracking shows it to be hitting the top of the leg-stump. Latham lbw b Gerald Coetzee 7(6) [4s-1]
Gerald Coetzee to Latham, THATS OUT!! Lbw!!
Gerald Coetzee to Latham, wide, length ball well outside leg, Latham walks across to scoop and misses
Nqobani Mokoena to Latham, 1 run, short ball, pulled through backward square-leg. The man in the deep over-runs to his left but adjusts well in the end and stops it with his right hand
Nqobani Mokoena to Latham, FOUR, away-angling length ball, Latham drives away from his body and the outside-edge goes through vacant slip. Races away to third man for four
Nqobani Mokoena to Tim Robinson, 1 run, 133.8kph, pats this length ball towards point

Nqobani Mokoena to Tim Robinson, FOUR, Tim Robinson gets off the mark with an authoritative pull shot. In-angling shortish ball, waist-high, Robinson spots the length early and pulls it over mid-wicket for a one-bounce four
Nqobani Mokoena to Latham, 1 run, back of a length, tapped towards point for a quick single
Nqobani Mokoena to Latham, no run, on a length and just outside off from over the wicket, Latham pushes it to backward point
Nqobani Mokoena, right-arm fast medium, comes into the attack
Tim Robinson, right handed bat, comes to the crease

Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, out Caught by de Zorzi!! Conway falls early and Coetzee is pumped up. In-angling length ball on the stumps, not short enough to be pulling. Hits the splice of the bat and he doesn't get the necessary elevation. De Zorzi, at mid-wicket, times his jump well to take an overhead catch. Devon Conway c de Zorzi b Gerald Coetzee 1(5)
Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, THATS OUT!! Caught!!
Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, no run, very full and way outside off, Conway shimmies down and moves leg-side premeditatively. Tries to reach for it and doesn't connect
Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, no run, shortened length, Conway looks to pull and misses to get hit on the thigh
Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, no run, nips back in from a length and cramps the batter for room who defends from the crease. Beaten on the inside-edge to get hit on the midriff
Gerald Coetzee to Latham, 1 run, pushed to backward point
Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, 1 run, Gerald Coetzee to Devon Conway, 1 run, to third man, the ball to third man
Devon Conway and Latham are at the crease. Devon Conway is on strike. Gerald Coetzee will open the attack
It's action time. Two left-handers to open the innings for New Zealand. Coetzee has the new ball in his hand. One slip in place. Here we go....

The players and match officials make their way out to the middle. A minute of silence observed for the Mount Maunganui landslide victims. Time for the national anthms next. South Africa's first, followed by New Zealand's. The pre-match ritual is completed.
Keshav Maharaj: The (semi-final) disappointment is there. We have got a new squad with fresh faces. Hopefully that youth within our environment portrays on to the field today.

Mitchell Santner: It's a great series to be a part of. We know South Africa are a great side, great games over the last few years. To play in front of another great crowd in New Zealand is always nice. (Conditions) Looks pretty good, Maybe it will start slow, Kesh will be pretty happy with that as well. It's what we do with the bat, start and see what the pitch plays like. Go out there and get some runs.
Nick Kelly is making his T20I debut. As many as four South Africans will be playing their first international match - Connor Esterhuizen, Jordan Hermann, Dian Forrester and Nqobani Mokoena.
Teams:

South Africa (Playing XI): Connor Esterhuizen(w), Jordan Hermann, Tony de Zorzi, Rubin Hermann, Jason Smith, Dian Forrester, George Linde, Gerald Coetzee, Keshav Maharaj(c), Nqobani Mokoena, Ottneil Baartman
New Zealand (Playing XI): Devon Conway, Tom Latham(w), Tim Robinson, Nick Kelly, Bevon Jacobs, James Neesham, Mitchell Santner(c), Zakary Foulkes, Cole McConchie, Kyle Jamieson, Ben Sears
New Zealand have won the toss and have opted to bat

18:20 Local Time, 05:20, 10:50 IST Just 10 days after facing off in the T20 World Cup semi-final at the iconic Eden Gardens, New Zealand and South Africa lock horns against each other in a bilateral series. Hello everyone and a warm welcome to the first of the five T20Is. Bay Oval will be the battleground for today's clash. South Africa's 7-match unbeaten run in the World Cup ended when the Kiwis humbled them. The New Zealanders, on the other hand, were thrashed by India in the final. As many as seven members of NZ's World Cup squad will feature in this series. Tom Latham, who is back in the T20I setup, will captain the side for the final two matches of the series. South Africa, meanwhile, will be led by Keshav Maharaj, one of the three SA players from the World Cup squad. George Linde and Jason Smith who weren't regulars in the XI are the other two in this squad. There are plenty of inexperienced players in both camps, they'll be keen to put on a show. A short while ago, the White Ferns beat the South African women's team convincingly at this venue after posting 190 on the board. Let's find out what's in store for the men's T20I. Stick around for the toss and team updates...

data.headline: Match Forecast: New Zealand vs South Africa, 1st T20I

data.commText: Squads:

South Africa Squad: Tony de Zorzi, Jason Smith, Jordan Hermann, George Linde, Wiaan Mulder, Connor Esterhuizen(w), Prenelan Subrayen, Dian Forrester, Gerald Coetzee, Ottneil Baartman, Keshav Maharaj(c), Lutho Sipamla, Rubin Hermann, Andile Simelane, Nqobani Mokoena

New Zealand Squad: Devon Conway(w), Tim Robinson, Tom Latham, James Neesham, Josh Clarkson, Mitchell Santner(c), Bevon Jacobs, Nathan Smith, Kyle Jamieson, Lockie Ferguson, Ish Sodhi, Cole McConchie, Dane Cleaver, Nick Kelly, Ben Sears, Katene D Clarke, Jayden Lennox, Zakary Foulkes
